name: Human
description: Versatile and adaptable, humans are generally well rounded. Humans tend toward prayer.

name: Dwarf
description: Stalwart defenders with natural resistance, but less agile than other races. They are defined by their stamina.

name: Elf
description: Swift and graceful, elves excel at magic and precision strikes. Their senses are always keen.

name: Orc
description: Savage and powerful, orcs deal tremendous damage but lack finesse. They have a trend toward bloodlust.

name: Halfling
description: Small but cunning, halflings excel at avoiding danger. They have a knack for remaining hidden.
